title: Integrated Operating-System, Application, Mobile, and Security Triage · Causal Recall
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs integrated operating-system, application, mobile, and security triage from user impact, asset identity, safety, baseline, symptom, recent change, hypothesis, test, observation, repair, verification, prevention, escalation, documentation, and transfer evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for integrated software and security fault tree after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice…
objectives: Separate performance, resource, compatibility, corruption, configuration, update, account, policy, storage, network, hardware, malicious, and user-workflow hypotheses.
Correlate reproduction, process, service, dependency, logs, resource, update, driver, disk, integrity, safe mode, clean boot, profile, and changed-user evidence.
Trace identity, lockout, time, certificate chain, hostname, trust, proxy, captive portal, browser profile, extension, permissions, redirect, and network interception.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# comptia-a-plus cumulative fictional support evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic text-contract review only. They never execute learner
# commands, inspect the host, touch devices or accounts, connect to networks, open equipment,
# handle malware, erase media, contact people, or claim certification.
workspace: support
ticket-id: fictional-ticket
user-impact: [replace with user outcome, scope, severity, and urgency]
environment: [replace with asset, version, configuration, owner, dependency, and evidence time]
safety-authority: [replace with consent, hazards, data custody, privacy, access, and stop rules]
baseline: [replace with expected behavior, known-good state, conditions, and measurement]
symptom: [replace with observed behavior, reproduction, frequency, timing, and evidence]
recent-change: [replace with timeline, relevant changes, counterevidence, and unknowns]
hypothesis: [replace with falsifiable cause, competing explanation, prediction, and confidence]
test: [replace with one safe reversible discriminating test, changed case, and stop rule]
observation: [replace with actual result, provenance, rejected inference, and next decision]
repair-rollback: [replace with least-change repair, authority, backup, trigger, and restored state]
verify: [replace with user outcome, original, changed, side-effect, restart, and recurrence checks]
prevention: [replace with prevention, monitoring, owner, review date, and residual risk]
escalation: [replace with stop threshold, destination, evidence packet, and requested decision]
documentation: [replace with plain structured status, redaction, access, handoff, and uncertainty]
transfer-boundary: authorized disposable equipment or simulator only
review:

steps.title: CompTIA A+ support Separate evidence from confidence · Review Software Security Proof
steps.instruction:
review case — Slow startup, crashes, redirects, lockouts, certificate warnings, mobile pop-ups, and network errors follow an unknown change. The review variation 6 changes the user outcome, device, version, hazard, recent change, symptom, access need, competing cause, and transfer limit. Competency probe: Repair the first supported cause, verify original and changed identities, applications, networks, restarts, updates, protections, backups, accessibility, and recurrence monitoring.

Inspect the Software Security Proof trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: CompTIA A+ support Separate evidence from confidence · Review Software Security Proof.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for repair the first supported cause, verify original and changed identities, applications, networks, restarts, updates, protections, backups, accessibility, and recurrence monitoring. stimulus.title: Software Security Proof case record

lines.label: assumption

steps.title: CompTIA A+ support Record what required effort · Review Software Security Proof

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation.
